chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 846 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan, Advocate for applicant Mr. Riaz Ali Panhwar, Advocate for respondent No.7 Ms. Sana Memon, APG Mr. Saeed Shams Memon Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record. Mr. Awan’s grievance is that a girl named Faiza has been abducted by respondent Nos. 5 to 7; there is an FIR which has been registered under Section 365-B PPC at Police Station Pinjari being FIR No. 194 of 2025; Investigation is ongoing; preliminary findings are that the girl might have married with somebody with her own free will. Be that as it may, this is hardly a case of a missing person and that an FIR has already been registered. The parties should wait for the conclusion of the investigation in the case. The application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
